# Sandchest API

> Compact API index for language models. Generated from the live OpenAPI 3.1 specification.

- Base URL: https://api.sandchest.com
- OpenAPI: https://api.sandchest.com/openapi.json
- API reference: https://docs.sandchest.com/docs/api-reference
- Full LLM reference: https://docs.sandchest.com/llms-full.txt
- Operations: 29

## Authentication

Use `Authorization: Bearer <api_key>` for authenticated endpoints. Health probes and the public replay endpoint do not require authentication.

## Endpoint Groups

- [Health](https://docs.sandchest.com/llms-full.txt#health): Health and readiness probes (3 operations)
- [Sandboxes](https://docs.sandchest.com/llms-full.txt#sandboxes): Create, manage, fork, and stop sandboxes (8 operations)
- [Exec](https://docs.sandchest.com/llms-full.txt#exec): Execute commands in sandboxes (4 operations)
- [Sessions](https://docs.sandchest.com/llms-full.txt#sessions): Interactive terminal sessions (6 operations)
- [Files](https://docs.sandchest.com/llms-full.txt#files): File upload, download, and listing (3 operations)
- [Artifacts](https://docs.sandchest.com/llms-full.txt#artifacts): Register and retrieve build artifacts (2 operations)
- [Replay](https://docs.sandchest.com/llms-full.txt#replay): Replay bundles and visibility (3 operations)
